./tasks/task_041/step_3_log.json:      "content": "```python\nimport re\nimport os\n\nurl_pattern = re.compile(r'https?://[^\\s]+')\nurls = []\n\nfor root, _, files in os.walk('.'):\n    for file in files:\n        if file.endswith('.txt'):\n            file_path = os.path.join(root, file)\n            try:\n                with open(file_path, 'r') as f:\n                    content = f.read()\n                    found_urls = url_pattern.findall(content)\n                    urls.extend(found_urls)\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"Error reading {file_path}: {e}\")\n\nprint(\"Extracted URLs:\")\nfor url in urls:\n    print(url)\n```"

not from assumption.\n\nyour output must always be exactly one markdown code block.\n\nif using python, the response must start with:\n\n```python\n\nif using shell, the response must start with:\n\n```bash\n\nchoose whichever language is most appropriate for the current step.\n\ncode should not need sudo permission or ask for it.\noutput no text outside the code block.\noutput no explanations.\noutput no reasoning.\n\ntask description:\n\ntask description: generate a report of file extensions and their counts"
